decision_logic.HAM10000_ISIC2019: accepted for 7-class mapping after excluding ISIC2019 SCC and UNK extension labels
decision_logic.ISIC2020: accepted as binary melanoma-only task, not directly pooled with 7-class datasets
decision_logic.Fitzpatrick17k: rejected for direct dermoscopy pooling; reserved for external stress/coarse mapping because it is broad dermatology
